name: Title
searchText: title h1-h6 heading @mantine/core /core/title lineclamp order size textwrap

props.name: lineClamp
props.description: Number of lines after which heading will be truncated

props.name: order
props.description: Heading order (1-6), controls font-size style if size prop is not set

props.name: size
props.description: Changes title size, if not set, then size is controlled by order prop
